disease_info.description: Healthy skin shows no signs of infection, inflammation, or abnormal growth. Minor variations such as moles, freckles, and healed scars may appear but remain benign.
disease_info.common_symptoms: No significant symptoms, even texture, normal skin tone
disease_info.recommended_action: No action needed; maintain skincare routine.
disease_info.image_indicators: Smooth texture, uniform color, normal pores, absence of lesions
